_documentation:
=========================================================================================
MT_SMALI PATCH ENGINE CONFIGURATION
This file defines an array of smali patching jobs. Each object represents an APK to process.

AVAILABLE OPERATIONS:
- return_void         : Replaces method body with a void return.
- return_true         : Replaces method body with return true (0x1).
- return_false        : Replaces method body with return false (0x0).
- return_minus1       : Replaces method body with return -1.
- return_null         : Replaces method body with return null (0x0).
- return_empty_string : Replaces method body with return "" (empty string).
- return_int          : Replaces method body with return <value>.
- replace_body        : Completely replaces method body with custom <registers> and <lines> array.
- replace_line        : Replaces a specific line matching <match> with <replacement> array.
- delete_line         : Deletes a specific line matching <match>.
- insert_before       : Inserts <lines> array before a line matching <match>.
- insert_after        : Inserts <lines> array after a line matching <match>.
- replace_string      : Replaces <old_value> string with <new_value> string in const-string definitions.
- set_flags           : Adds/removes modifiers (public, private, static, etc.) from a method.
- add_method_annotation    : Injects new annotations to a method.
- remove_method_annotation : Removes existing annotations from a method.
- add_class_annotation     : Injects new class-level annotations.
- remove_class_annotation  : Removes existing class-level annotations.
- replace_field_value : Changes the static initializer value of a specific field.
- rename_field        : Renames a field and updates all references in the file.

MATCH MODES for line operations:
- exact    : Default. Exact string match.
- contains : Substring match.
- regex    : Regular expression match. Supports backreferences (\1, \2) in replacement strings.

OCCURRENCES for line operations:
- first    : Default. Targets the first matched line in the method.
- last     : Targets the last matched line in the method.
- all      : Targets all matched lines in the method.
=========================================================================================

patches._comment: Enable Default Google Services by forcing IS_INTERNATIONAL_BUILD to true
